---
title: "shiny_shell"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
#install.packages('shinydashboard')
library(shiny)
library(shinydashboard)
library(tidyverse)
#install.packages("janitor")
library(janitor)
nfl_data <- read.csv("master_data.csv") %>%
  janitor::clean_names() %>%
  mutate(
    temperature = if ("temp_f" %in% names(.)) as.numeric(temp_f) else NA_real_,
    injured_next_week = as.numeric(as.logical(injured_next_week)),
    surface_type = as.character(surface_type)
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(surface_type),
    !is.na(team)
  )
```

```{r}
ui <- dashboardPage(
  skin = "black",
  dashboardHeader(
    title = span(
      img(src = "https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/a/a2/National_Football_League_logo.svg",
          height = "30px", style = "margin-right: 8px;"),
      "NFL Injury Risk Dashboard"
    ),
    titleWidth = 300
  ),
  
  dashboardSidebar(
    width = 300,
    sidebarMenu(
      id = "tabs",
      menuItem("Overview", tabName = "overview", icon = icon("chart-line")),
      menuItem("Injury Risk Predictor", tabName = "predictor", icon = icon("user-injured")),
      menuItem("Position Analysis", tabName = "position", icon = icon("running")),
      menuItem("Game & Environment", tabName = "environment", icon = icon("cloud-sun")),
      menuItem("Workload & Snap Count", tabName = "workload", icon = icon("stopwatch")),
      menuItem("Individual Team Dashboard", tabName = "team", icon = icon("shield-alt")),
      menuItem("Rule Changes Impact",   tabName = "rules", icon = icon("gavel"))
    ),
    hr(),
    tags$div(
      style = "padding: 0 15px;",
      tags$h4("Global Filters", style = "color: #b8c7ce; font-size: 13px;"),
      sliderInput("season_range", "Seasons:", min = 2010, max = 2024, value = c(2010, 2024), sep = ""),
      selectInput("game_type", "Game Type:", choices = c("All", "REG", "POST"), selected = "All")
    )
  ),
  
  dashboardBody(
    tags$head(tags$style(HTML("
      .content-wrapper, .right-side { background-color: #1a1a2e; }
      .box { border-top: 3px solid #c9243f; background-color: #16213e; color: #e0e0e0; border-radius: 8px; }
      .info-box { background-color: #16213e !important; color: #ffffff !important; border-radius: 8px; }
      h3.page-title { color: #ffffff; font-size: 24px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 25px; }
      .table { color: #e0e0e0; }
    "))),
    
    tabItems(
      # --- Tab: Environment (FIXED) ---
      tabItem(tabName = "environment",
        h3("Game & Environmental Factors", class = "page-title"),
        fluidRow(
          box(title = "Surface Filter", width = 4, status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE,
              checkboxGroupInput("surface_choice", "Select Surface:", 
                                 choices = unique(nfl_data$surface_type), 
                                 selected = unique(nfl_data$surface_type))),
          box(title = "Temp Filter", width = 8, status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE,
              sliderInput("temp_slider", "Temperature Range (°F):", 
                          min = min(nfl_data$temperature, na.rm=T), 
                          max = max(nfl_data$temperature, na.rm=T), 
                          value = c(20, 90)))
        ),
        fluidRow(
          box(title = "Injury Rate by Surface", width = 6, plotOutput("surface_comparison")),
          box(title = "Injury Trend by Temperature", width = 6, plotOutput("temp_plot"))
        )
      ),
      
    

      # --- Tab: Workload ---
      tabItem(tabName = "workload",
        h3("Workload & Snap Count", class = "page-title"),
        fluidRow(
          box(width = 4, status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE, title = "Controls",
              sliderInput("play_limit", "Focus Play Count Range:", min = 0, max = 100, value = c(0, 80)),
              p("Analysis shows risk increases significantly after 60+ snaps.", style = "font-size: 12px; color: #b8c7ce;")),
          box(width = 8, title = "Probability Curve", plotOutput("workload_plot"))
        )
      ),

      # --- Tab: Team Dashboard ---
      tabItem(tabName = "team",
        h3("Individual Team Dashboard", class = "page-title"),
        fluidRow(
          box(width = 4, status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE, title = "Team Selector",
              selectInput("team_select", "Select Team:", choices = sort(unique(nfl_data$team)))),
          infoBoxOutput("team_injuries_box", width = 8)
        ),
        fluidRow(
          box(title = "High Risk Exposure Roster", width = 12, tableOutput("team_table"))
        )
      ),

      # Tab: Overview 
      tabItem(tabName = "overview",
        h3("League-Wide Injury Trends", class = "page-title"),
        fluidRow(infoBoxOutput("total_injuries_box", width = 3),
                 infoBoxOutput("avg_per_season_box", width = 3),
                 infoBoxOutput("injury_rate_box", width = 3),
                 infoBoxOutput("injury_cost_box", width = 3)),
        fluidRow(box(title = "Weekly Injury Trend", width = 12, plotOutput("injury_season_trend"))),
        fluidRow(box(title = "Injury Rate by Position", width = 6, plotOutput("overview_position_plot")),
                 box(title = "Workload vs Injury Risk", width = 6, plotOutput("overview_workload_plot"))),
        fluidRow(box(title = "About this Dashboard", width = 12, p("This dashboard analyzes injury across the NFL using player workload, environment, and positional data."),
                     tags$ul(
                       tags$li("Use filters to explore trends"),
                       tags$li("Compare injury rates across positions and conditions"),
                       tags$li("Use the predictor tab to estimate injury risk")
                     ))),
      ),
      
      # --- Tab: Position Analysis ---
      tabItem(tabName = "position",
        h3("Position Analysis", class = "page-title"),
        fluidRow(
          box(width = 4, status = "danger",
              checkboxGroupInput(
                "position_choice", "Select Positions:",
                choices  = sort(unique(nfl_data$position_group)),
                selected = sort(unique(nfl_data$position_group))
              )
          ),
          box(title = "Injury Rate by Position", width = 8,
              plotOutput("position_rate_plot"))
        )
      ),
      
     
      # --- Tab: Predictor ---
       tabItem(tabName = "predictor",
  h3("Injury Risk Predictor", class = "page-title"),
  fluidRow(
    box(title = "Player Inputs", width = 4, status = "danger",
        selectInput("pred_model", "Select Model:",
                    choices = c("XGBoost", "Random Forest", "Lasso")),
        sliderInput("pred_age",   "Age:",               min = 21, max = 40, value = 26),
        sliderInput("pred_bmi",   "BMI:",               min = 20, max = 40, value = 27),
        sliderInput("pred_exp",   "Years Experience:",  min = 0,  max = 20, value = 3),
        sliderInput("pred_plays", "Total Plays:",       min = 0,  max = 80, value = 20),
        selectInput("pred_position", "Position Group:",
                    choices = c("QB", "RB", "Receiver", "O-Line",
                                "D-Line", "LB", "Secondary", "Special Teams")),
        selectInput("pred_surface", "Surface Type:",
                    choices = c("Natural Grass", "Artificial Turf", "Unknown")),
        actionButton("predict_btn", "Predict Injury Risk",
                     style = "background-color:#c9243f; color:white; width:100%;")
    ),
    box(title = "Predicted Injury Risk", width = 8, status = "danger",
        h3(textOutput("pred_probability"),
           style = "text-align:center; font-size:64px; color:#c9243f; margin-top:40px;"),
        h4(textOutput("pred_label"),
           style = "text-align:center; color:#e0e0e0; font-size:20px;"),
        hr(),
        p("Prediction based on XGBoost, Random Forest, or Lasso models trained on 2024 NFL data.",
          style = "color:#b8c7ce; font-size:12px;")
    )
  )
),
      tabItem(tabName = "rules",
  h3("Rule Changes & Injury Risk Factors", class = "page-title"),
  
  fluidRow(
    box(title = "Hits vs Injury Risk", width = 6, plotOutput("rules_hits_plot")),
    box(title = "Workload vs Injury Risk", width = 6, plotOutput("rules_workload_plot"))
  ),
  
  fluidRow(
    box(title = "Concussion Rate", width = 6, plotOutput("rules_concussion_plot")),
    box(title = "Interpretation", width = 6,
        p("NFL rule changes aim to reduce high-impact collisions and player workload."),
        p("These plots show how hits, workload, and concussion-related injuries relate to overall injury risk."),
        p("Higher exposure to hits and plays is associated with increased injury probability.")
    )
  )
) 
)  
)  
)  
  
# --- 3. SERVER LOGIC ---
server <- function(input, output, session) {
  
  #  GLOBAL PLOT THEME 

  theme_nfl_custom <- function() {
    theme_minimal() +
      theme(
        text = element_text(color = "white"),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "#2a3a5a"),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill = "#16213e", color = NA),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#16213e", color = NA),
        axis.text = element_text(color = "#b8c7ce"),
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14)
      )
  }


  base_data <- reactive({
    nfl_data %>%
      filter(season >= input$season_range[1] & season <= input$season_range[2]) %>%
      { if(input$game_type != "All") filter(., game_type == input$game_type) else . }
  })

  
  # Environment: Surface Plot
  output$surface_comparison <- renderPlot({
    req(input$surface_choice)
    base_data() %>%
      filter(surface_type %in% input$surface_choice) %>%
      group_by(surface_type) %>%
      summarise(rate = mean(injured_next_week, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = surface_type, y = rate, fill = surface_type)) +
      geom_col(width = 0.6) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = c("#c9243f", "#1e5128", "#3db2ff")) +
      theme_nfl_custom() +
      labs(x = NULL, y = "Injury Rate")
  })

  # Environment: Temp Plot
  output$temp_plot <- renderPlot({
    req(input$temp_slider)
    base_data() %>%
      filter(temperature >= input$temp_slider[1] & temperature <= input$temp_slider[2]) %>%
      group_by(temp_bucket) %>%
      summarise(rate = mean(injured_next_week, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = temp_bucket, y = rate, group = 1)) +
      geom_area(fill = "#c9243f", alpha = 0.3) +
      geom_line(color = "#c9243f", size = 1.5) +
      geom_point(color = "white", size = 3, stroke = 1) +
      theme_nfl_custom() +
      labs(x = "Climate Group", y = "Injury Risk")
  })

  # Workload: Risk Curve
  output$workload_plot <- renderPlot({
    base_data() %>%
      filter(total_plays >= input$play_limit[1] & total_plays <= input$play_limit[2]) %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = total_plays, y = injured_next_week)) +
      geom_smooth(method = "glm", method.args = list(family = "binomial"), 
                  color = "#4ecca3", fill = "#4ecca3", alpha = 0.2) +
      theme_nfl_custom() +
      labs(y = "Probability of Injury", x = "Total Snaps in Game")
  })

  # Team: Table & Box
  output$team_injuries_box <- renderInfoBox({
    val <- base_data() %>% filter(team == input$team_select) %>% pull(injured_next_week) %>% sum(na.rm = TRUE)
    infoBox("Team Total Injuries", val, icon = icon("user-injured"), color = "red", fill = TRUE)
  })

  output$team_table <- renderTable({
    req(input$team_select)
    base_data() %>%
      filter(team == input$team_select) %>%
      select(full_name, position, total_plays, injured_next_week) %>%
      arrange(desc(total_plays)) %>%
      head(15)
  })


  # PREDICTOR LOGIC 
  
  # Load models
  xgb_model   <- readRDS("rds files 2/copyxgb_model.rds")
  rf_model    <- readRDS("rds files 2/copyrf_model.rds")
  final_lasso <- readRDS("rds files 2/copylasso_model.rds")
  cv_lasso    <- readRDS("rds files 2/copycv_lasso.rds")
  
  #models
  position_levels <- c("D-Line", "LB", "O-Line", "Other", "QB",
                      "RB", "Receiver", "Secondary", "Special Teams")
surface_levels  <- c("Artificial Turf", "Natural Grass", "Unknown")
temp_levels     <- c("Cold", "Cool", "Dome/Unknown", "Freezing", "Hot", "Moderate")

observeEvent(input$predict_btn, {
  
  pred_input <- matrix(c(
    input$pred_exp,
    as.integer(factor(input$pred_surface, levels = surface_levels)),
    as.integer(factor("Dome/Unknown",     levels = temp_levels)),
    input$pred_plays,
    0,   # avg_air_yards default
    input$pred_bmi,
    0,   # rush_plays default
    input$pred_age,
    as.integer(factor(input$pred_position, levels = position_levels)),
    1,   # is_home default
    50   # avg_ydline_100 default
  ), nrow = 1)
  
  colnames(pred_input) <- c("years_exp", "surface_type", "temp_bucket",
                             "total_plays", "avg_air_yards", "bmi",
                             "rush_plays", "age", "position_group",
                             "is_home", "avg_ydline_100")

  prob <- if (input$pred_model == "XGBoost") {
    predict(xgb_model, xgb.DMatrix(pred_input))
  } else if (input$pred_model == "Random Forest") {
    predict(rf_model, newdata = pred_input, type = "prob")[, "1"]
  } else {
    as.numeric(predict(final_lasso, newx = pred_input, s = cv_lasso$lambda.min))
  }

  pct <- round(prob * 100, 1)

  output$pred_label <- renderText({
    if (prob >= 0.5) "High Injury Risk"
    else if (prob >= 0.3) "Moderate Injury Risk"
    else "Low Injury Risk"
  })
})
  # Position Analysis
  output$position_rate_plot <- renderPlot({
    req(input$position_choice)
    base_data() %>%
      filter(position_group %in% input$position_choice) %>%
      group_by(position_group) %>%
      summarise(injury_rate = mean(injured_next_week, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = reorder(position_group, injury_rate), 
                 y = injury_rate, fill = position_group)) +
      geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
      coord_flip() +
      scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
      labs(x = "Position Group", y = "Injury Rate") +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(text = element_text(color = "white"),
            panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#16213e", color = NA),
            plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "#16213e", color = NA))
  })
  

  # Overview metrics
  output$total_injuries_box <- renderInfoBox({
    val <- sum(base_data()$injured_next_week, na.rm = TRUE)
    infoBox("Total Injuries", val, icon = icon("user-injured"), color = "red")
  })
  
  output$avg_per_week_box <- renderInfoBox({
  val <- base_data() %>%
    group_by(week) %>%
    summarise(inj = sum(injured_next_week)) %>%
    summarise(mean(inj)) %>%
    pull()
    infoBox("Avg Injuries / Week", round(val,1), icon = icon("chart-line"), color = "yellow")
})
  
  output$injury_rate_box <- renderInfoBox({
  val <- mean(base_data()$injured_next_week, na.rm = TRUE)
  infoBox("Injury Rate", paste0(round(val*100,1), "%"), icon = icon("percent"), color = "aqua")
})
  
  output$avg_per_season_box <- renderInfoBox({
  val <- base_data() %>%
    group_by(season) %>%
    summarise(inj = sum(injured_next_week)) %>%
    summarise(mean(inj)) %>%
    pull()
  
  infoBox("Avg Injuries / Season", round(val,1),
          icon = icon("calendar"), color = "yellow")
})
  
  # Overview Plots
  output$injury_season_trend <- renderPlot({
  base_data() %>%
    group_by(week) %>%
    summarise(injuries = sum(injured_next_week)) %>%
    ggplot(aes(week, injuries)) +
    geom_line(color = "#c9243f", size = 1.2) +
    theme_minimal()
})
  
  output$overview_position_plot <- renderPlot({
  base_data() %>%
    group_by(position_group) %>%
    summarise(rate = mean(injured_next_week)) %>%
    ggplot(aes(reorder(position_group, rate), rate, fill = position_group)) +
    geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
    coord_flip() +
    theme_minimal()
})
  
  output$overview_workload_plot <- renderPlot({
  base_data() %>%
    ggplot(aes(total_plays, injured_next_week)) +
    geom_smooth(method = "glm", method.args = list(family = "binomial"),
                color = "#c9243f") +
    theme_minimal()
})
  
  output$injury_cost_box <- renderInfoBox({
  infoBox(
    "Estimated Injury Cost",
    "$500 - 800M+ / year",
    subtitle = "League-wide estimate",
    icon = icon("dollar-sign"),
    color = "green"
  )
})
  
  # Rules Impact

output$rules_hits_plot <- renderPlot({
  req(base_data())
  
  base_data() %>%
    filter(!is.na(times_hit), !is.na(injured_next_week)) %>%
    ggplot(aes(times_hit, injured_next_week)) +
    geom_smooth(method = "glm",
                method.args = list(family = "binomial"),
                color = "#c9243f") +
    theme_minimal()
})

output$rules_workload_plot <- renderPlot({
  req(base_data())
  
  base_data() %>%
    filter(!is.na(total_plays), !is.na(injured_next_week)) %>%
    ggplot(aes(total_plays, injured_next_week)) +
    geom_smooth(method = "glm",
                method.args = list(family = "binomial"),
                color = "#c9243f") +
    theme_minimal()
})

output$rules_concussion_plot <- renderPlot({
  req(base_data())
  
  base_data() %>%
    filter(!is.na(injured_next_week)) %>%
    summarise(rate = mean(injured_next_week)) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = "All Players", y = rate)) +
    geom_col(fill = "#c9243f") +
    ylim(0,1) +
    theme_minimal()
})

}

# --- 4. RUN APP ---
shinyApp(ui, server)
```
